channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Property Listings
channel.description: Live Zimbabwe property listings with branded hybrid cards — photo on top, price and specs on the brand strip. One item per active listing for the Mutapa Times properties autolist.

item.title: USD 135,000 — Marlborough 4-Bed Townhouse Complex — Solar, Walled (Marlborough, Harare West)
item.description: USD 135,000 — Marlborough, Harare West. 4 beds, 3 baths. Marlborough 4-Bed Townhouse Complex — Solar, Walled. Browse all listings at mutapatimes.com/property #Zimbabwe #Property #ZimbabweProperty #RealEstate #ZimbabweNews
